tools.name: package_info
tools.description: Get core metadata for a package: latest version, description, license, homepage, source repository, maintainers, and whether it is deprecated. Use before an agent installs or recommends a dependency. Ecosystems: npm, pypi, cargo.

tools.name: package_versions
tools.description: List recent released versions of a package with release dates (most recent first). Helps an agent pick a version or check how actively it is maintained. Ecosystems: npm, pypi, cargo.

tools.name: package_downloads
tools.description: Get popularity/download statistics for a package (recent download counts). Useful for judging how widely used and battle-tested a dependency is. Ecosystems: npm, pypi, cargo.

tools.name: package_dependencies
tools.description: List the direct dependencies of a specific package version (defaults to latest), via deps.dev. Lets an agent understand what a package pulls in before adding it. Ecosystems: npm, pypi, cargo.

tools.name: package_health
tools.description: A composite trust/health check for a package an agent is considering: latest-release recency, deprecation status, license present, maintainer count, dependency count, and any known security advisories (via deps.dev). Returns a summary an agent can act on. Ecosystems: npm, pypi, cargo.

tools.name: package_search
tools.description: Search for packages by keyword and get the top matches with descriptions. Supported ecosystems: npm and cargo (PyPI has no public search API).
